findings.summary: Integration tests exist only for GroupsPage; other pages mock all children
evidence: BudgetBuilderPage.test.jsx mocks all 3 child components; SyncPage.test.jsx composes SyncControl, SyncJobStatus, SyncHistory, AutoSyncSettings but never renders them as real components. Only GroupsPage.integration.test.jsx tests real parent-child data flow.
findings.suggestion: Add integration test files for BudgetPage and SyncPage that render real children with mocked recharts/useResponsive, following the GroupsPage.integration.test.jsx pattern.

findings.summary: formatDateLabel in chartUtils.jsx is a pure function with no test coverage
evidence: formatDateLabel (line 29-32) is used as XAxis tickFormatter in sharedChartElements, consumed by two chart components. chartUtils.test.jsx tests 9 other exported functions but not this one.
findings.suggestion: Add tests for formatDateLabel covering standard dates, year boundaries, and the T00:00:00 suffix handling.

findings.summary: sharedChartElements rendering helper has no unit test for prop-wiring logic
evidence: sharedChartElements (line 140-162) produces CartesianGrid, XAxis, YAxis, Tooltip children with configurable yAxisWidth and tooltip. While recharts is mocked in consuming tests, the function's prop wiring is untested at the unit level.
findings.suggestion: Add a test that calls sharedChartElements({yAxisWidth: 72, tooltip: <div/>}) and verifies the returned array has 4 elements with expected keys and props.
